landing.heroDescription: RiskNova is an AI-powered OHS platform designed to unify risk analysis, field tracking, recording, reporting and decision support processes into a single product experience.
landing.featuresDescription: Professional tools that manage your OHS processes end-to-end.
landing.feat1Desc: A product foundation that collects manual or module-based risk inputs in a single flow and makes results more visible.
landing.feat2Desc: Brings together audit, finding, task and tracking areas in an order that the operations team can read.
landing.feat3Desc: Provides a consistent screen backbone where generated results can be linked to history, detail and output processes.
landing.feat4Desc: Prepares a professional and trust-inspiring foundation for areas such as risk analysis screen, results screen and score history.
landing.feat5Desc: Maintains readability across different devices with single column, two column and wide screen layouts.
landing.feat6Desc: Creates a professional SaaS feel with clean surfaces, controlled contrast and clear CTA structure.
landing.howDescription: Simple steps to get started with our platform.
landing.step1Desc: Sign in securely to the platform with your organization-specific account.
landing.step2Desc: Transfer field audits, hazard reports and risk parameters to the system.
landing.step3Desc: Our AI-powered analysis engine processes your data to calculate risk scores.
landing.step4Desc: Create action plans based on results, track and report.
landing.whyDescription: Creates a professional SaaS experience with blue trust and gold quality emphasis, clean surfaces and soft contrast.
landing.whyBullet1: Clean, modern and trust-inspiring OHS appearance
landing.whyBullet3: Design system ready for Risk Intelligence module
landing.ctaTitle: Turn your risk module into a product showcase
landing.ctaDescription: Manage your OHS processes on a single platform with professional appearance, powerful infrastructure and AI support.
landing.metaTitle: Manage OHS from one platform | RiskNova
landing.metaDescription: AI-powered workplace safety software: risk analysis, field audits, findings, CAPA and reporting in one platform — individual, OSGB and enterprise.
landing.metaOgTitle: RiskNova — Manage OHS from one platform
landing.metaOgDescription: From measurement to audits, actions and reports — run safety processes in one place.
landing.heroSubtitle: From measurement to audit findings, action tracking, reporting and archives — unify processes under one roof. Scales from individuals to OSGBs and multi-site enterprises.
landing.solutionsLeadBold: Are you an OSGB or a multi-site organisation?
landing.solutionsLeadRest: Review plans, leave a lead via quote or signup — our team will follow up.
landing.valueTryTitle: Risk, audits and reporting in one product experience
landing.valueTryDesc: Forms, results, score history and outputs use consistent screens — your team keeps operating without friction.
landing.testimonial1Quote: Field audits became much more systematic with RiskNova. The AI commentary is genuinely helpful.
landing.testimonial2Quote: Having risk analysis, reporting and tracking in one platform improved our operational efficiency.
landing.testimonial3Quote: Corporate look and ease of use meant the team adopted it very quickly.
landing.bottomCtaDescription: Manage all your workplace safety operations from risk analysis to reporting on a single platform with RiskNova.
landing.footerBlurb: AI-powered OHS risk analysis and operations platform — professional, reliable and modern.
landing.subscriptionDisclaimer: RiskNova provides subscription-based workplace health and safety software.

auth.loginDescription: Continue managing risk analysis, field tracking and reporting processes on a single platform.
auth.registerDescription: Digitize your OHS processes and benefit from AI-powered decision-making mechanisms.
auth.forgotDescription: Enter your email address and we'll send you a password reset link.

solutionCenter.title: Nova
solutionCenter.description: Nova is the operational OHS agent that interprets legislation, routes you to the right module, and starts document or workflow actions.
solutionCenter.inputPlaceholder: Tell Nova what you want to do...

email.title: Change Email
email.info: Email changes require verification. The account email will not update until you open the link sent to the new address.

password.title: Change Password
password.newPlaceholder: At least 12 chars, upper/lower case, number and symbol

mfa.title: Two-Factor Authentication
mfa.description: Works with Google Authenticator, Authy and similar TOTP apps. Once enabled, this account is protected by a second factor.
mfa.onlyPassword: Your account is currently protected only by password.
mfa.addDeviceHint: Scan the QR code with Google Authenticator. You can give the device a custom name.
mfa.backupWarning: Backup codes are not supported. For critical accounts, enroll at least two different TOTP devices.
mfa.noDevices: No MFA device is connected yet.

danger.title: Danger Zone
danger.description: Deleting your account permanently removes all your data and this action cannot be undone. Under KVKK, the deletion completes within 30 days.
danger.redirectMsg: Account deletion flow is opened in the Privacy & Consents tab.

msg.emailServiceError: Could not reach email update service.
msg.emailEmpty: New email address cannot be empty.
msg.emailSame: New email cannot be the same as current.
msg.emailConfirmSent: Verification link sent to the new address.
msg.mfaServiceError: Could not reach two-factor auth service.
msg.mfaEnrolled: Enrollment created. Verify the code now to enable 2FA.
msg.mfaRemoveConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove this MFA device?

consent.title: Privacy & Consents
consent.description: Active disclosure and KVKK texts are listed here. When a new version is published, the system prompts you to consent again.

dataRights.title: Data Rights
dataRights.description: Download your personal data, create a deletion request and track the status of your current KVKK processes.
dataRights.exportDescription: Profile, consent records, security events and data-rights history can be downloaded as JSON or CSV.
dataRights.exportJsonDesc: Structured bundle of all your data
dataRights.exportHistoryEmpty: No data export record created yet.
dataRights.deletionDescription: When you create a request, your account and related personal data enter the deletion process. Permanent deletion completes after 30 days per retention policy.
dataRights.deletionWarning: A deletion request can be cancelled administratively before the process becomes irreversible.
dataRights.deletionConfirm: This will start a 30-day deletion process for your account. Do you want to continue?
dataRights.deletionExists: You already have an active deletion request.
dataRights.deletionReceived: Your deletion request was received. Scheduled permanent deletion: {date}.

ohsFile.title: Workplace OHS File
ohsFile.description: Download all risk assessments, incidents, training records, documents and related data for {company} as a single year-based ZIP archive.
ohsFile.scopeEmpty: Scope template could not be loaded.
ohsFile.asyncHint: The archive is prepared in the background. You will be notified when it is ready.
ohsFile.alreadyRunning: An archive is currently being prepared; please wait for it to finish.
ohsFile.widgetSubtitle: Quick access to the most recently prepared workplace archives.
ohsFile.widgetEmpty: No OHS file yet. Open a company and go to the 'OHS File' tab.

leads.title: Demo & quote requests
leads.description: All requests from the landing “Request demo”, registration “OSGB” and “Enterprise” forms are listed here. Update status, mark contacted leads, and close converted ones.
leads.emptyDescription: OSGB/enterprise quote flows and landing “Request demo” submissions appear here.
leads.internalNoteHint: Not shown to the customer. Capture agreed terms or plan codes here.
leads.notesPlaceholder: e.g. Professional custom: 50 users, annual fee…

legalCorpus.title: Legal corpus by country
legalCorpus.description: Official regulatory documents ingested for RAG, grouped by jurisdiction. Tenant-private uploads stay on the tenant workspace path.
legalCorpus.ingestUkHint: Imports the latest UK Statutory Instruments entries from legislation.gov.uk Atom (titles + summaries).
